summary: A deep critical technical assessment of the CampuGrid distributed compute platform design document. Covers 7 major areas: a critical contradiction in the network isolation model, server architecture concerns (scheduler as SPOF, distributed state consistency, Redis HA), client-side weight and Docker dependency issues, ML training feasibility over WiFi, security gaps, missing infrastructure components, and framework/language decisions for all 4 deliverables. Each section includes specific questions requiring answers before implementation can begin.
